name: Spindle Collector
author: morose
description: Forwards Navidrome scrobbles to the Spindle stats backend

backend_url.title: Backend URL
backend_url.description: Base URL of the Spindle backend ingest service (no trailing slash)

shared_secret.title: Shared Secret
shared_secret.description: Must match the Spindle backend's INGEST_SECRET

http.reason: POST each scrobble to the Spindle backend ingest endpoint

users.reason: Receive scrobble events for users assigned to this plugin
